string.text:
Spray painting is a painting technique in which a device sprays coating material through the air onto a surface. The spray gun employs compressed air to atomize and direct the paint particles.
 
 %c[d_cyan] IN-GAME USE: 
 
 • This spray gun can be used to coat (compatible) guns in a specific camo pattern by dragging it on the firearm in the inventory. This will consume the paint spray gun.
 
 • To remove the coating, wash down the weapon using Kerosene (drag it on the weapon).

Spray painting is a painting technique in which a device sprays coating material through the air onto a surface. The spray gun employs compressed air to atomize and direct the paint particles.
 
 %c[d_cyan] IN-GAME USE: 
 
 • This spray gun can be used to coat (compatible) guns in TAZ83 (also known as Alpenflage or M70) by dragging it on the firearm in the inventory. This will consume the paint spray gun.
 
 • To remove the coating, wash down the weapon using Kerosene (drag it on the weapon).

Spray painting is a painting technique in which a device sprays coating material through the air onto a surface. The spray gun employs compressed air to atomize and direct the paint particles.
 
 %c[d_cyan] IN-GAME USE: 
 
 • This spray gun can be used to coat (compatible) guns in Arctic camouflage by dragging it on the firearm in the inventory. This will consume the paint spray gun.
 
 • To remove the coating, wash down the weapon using Kerosene (drag it on the weapon).

Spray painting is a painting technique in which a device sprays coating material through the air onto a surface. The spray gun employs compressed air to atomize and direct the paint particles.
 
 %c[d_cyan] IN-GAME USE: 
 
 • This spray gun can be used to coat (compatible) guns in Desert digital camouflage by dragging it on the firearm in the inventory. This will consume the paint spray gun.
 
 • To remove the coating, wash down the weapon using Kerosene (drag it on the weapon).

Spray painting is a painting technique in which a device sprays coating material through the air onto a surface. The spray gun employs compressed air to atomize and direct the paint particles.
 
 %c[d_cyan] IN-GAME USE: 
 
 • This spray gun can be used to coat (compatible) guns in FDE (Flat Dark Earth) color by dragging it on the firearm in the inventory. This will consume the paint spray gun.
 
 • To remove the coating, wash down the weapon using Kerosene (drag it on the weapon).

Spray painting is a painting technique in which a device sprays coating material through the air onto a surface. The spray gun employs compressed air to atomize and direct the paint particles.
 
 %c[d_cyan] IN-GAME USE: 
 
 • This spray gun can be used to coat (compatible) guns in typical Monolith urban camouflage by dragging it on the firearm in the inventory. This will consume the paint spray gun.
 
 • To remove the coating, wash down the weapon using Kerosene (drag it on the weapon).

Spray painting is a painting technique in which a device sprays coating material through the air onto a surface. The spray gun employs compressed air to atomize and direct the paint particles.
 
 %c[d_cyan] IN-GAME USE: 
 
 • This spray gun can be used to coat (compatible) guns in typical army green color patterns by dragging it on the firearm in the inventory. This will consume the paint spray gun.
 
 • To remove the coating, wash down the weapon using Kerosene (drag it on the weapon).

Spray painting is a painting technique in which a device sprays coating material through the air onto a surface. The spray gun employs compressed air to atomize and direct the paint particles.
 
 %c[d_cyan] IN-GAME USE: 
 
 • This spray gun can be used to coat (compatible) guns in Urban digital camouflage by dragging it on the firearm in the inventory. This will consume the paint spray gun.
 
 • To remove the coating, wash down the weapon using Kerosene (drag it on the weapon).

Spray painting is a painting technique in which a device sprays coating material through the air onto a surface. The spray gun employs compressed air to atomize and direct the paint particles.
 
 %c[d_cyan] IN-GAME USE: 
 
 • This spray gun can be used to coat (compatible) guns in Woodland camouflage by dragging it on the firearm in the inventory. This will consume the paint spray gun.
 
 • To remove the coating, wash down the weapon using Kerosene (drag it on the weapon).
